mapper.sql: id, sign_scene, subject_id, index_shop_id, project_code, status, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT subject_id) FROM t_sign WHERE sign_scene = #{signScene} AND index_shop_id = #{indexShopId} AND status = 'SIGNED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_sign (sign_scene, subject_id, index_shop_id, project_code, status, created_time, updated_time) VALUES (#{signScene}, #{subjectId}, #{indexShopId}, #{projectCode}, #{status}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime})
